seasonArc: Kimberley Le Court Pienaar's 2026 spring was repeatedly disrupted by misfortune at the worst moments. At Milano-Sanremo Donne the Mauritian was among the aggressors before being brought down in the heavy crash on the technical Cipressa descent that also took out Kasia Niewiadoma, ending her hopes in a race she had been positioned to contest. A frustrating Monument that, like several of her spring days, was undone by crashes and mechanicals rather than legs.
